---
id: join-section
title: "Join a section as the authenticated user"
description: "Adds the authenticated user as a `student` member of the given section."
sidebar_label: "Join a section as the authenticated user"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/askatlas-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Join a section as the authenticated user"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/courses/{course_id}/sections/{section_id}/members"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Adds the authenticated user as a `student` member of the given section.
The role is hardcoded to `student` regardless of any fields supplied in
the request body. `instructor` and `ta` roles are assigned only through
the seeding pipeline.


<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>

>
  
</ParamsDetails>

>
  
</RequestSchema>
